detail.description:
Are you ready to defeat the warlords
to become the Son of Heaven?

[Unite the World with Heroes of Three Kingdoms!]

Roam the battlefields with heroes of Three Kingdoms and win the battle.
Grow your heroes and bring the whole world under your rule.

[Collect the Warriors and Build Your Forces!]

Strategically build your own dispositions to get advantages over your enemies.
Deploy various warriors according to your tactics to make your unit stronger.

[Win the Battle by Collecting Different Types
detail.recentChanges:
Ver. 1.56.2
- Stages 39 and 40 have been added.
- Sky Tower 12th Floor has been added.
- Arena and All-out War rewards have been revamped.
- Cheongju Server: Hall of Fame is now open.
- Quality of Life: A filter has been added to the Necklace list.
- Minor bugs fixed.
